summary: Comprehensive testing of new Controls Library and AI Compliance features. Fixed critical bug in Controls Library form submission (regulatory_references and evidence_requirements were initialized as arrays instead of strings, causing .split() to fail). All backend API tests pass (73 tests). All frontend E2E tests pass (54 tests total).

issues.description: Controls Library form submission was broken - regulatory_references and evidence_requirements were initialized as arrays [] instead of strings '', causing .split() to fail silently when creating controls
issues.reproduction: 1. Navigate to Controls Library, 2. Click '+ New Control', 3. Fill form and click 'Create Control', 4. Modal would not close due to JavaScript error
issues.affected_test: Fixed during testing - controls-library.spec.ts:29 now passes

issues.description: Modal CSS styles were missing from App.css - modals were rendering at bottom of page instead of as centered overlays
issues.reproduction: Open any modal (Create Control, Register AI System) - modal would appear at bottom of page content
issues.affected_test: Fixed during testing - added modal-overlay and modal CSS classes

seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for controls, AI systems, and assessments
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working. Controls Library supports LOD1/LOD2 approval workflow. AI Compliance supports EU AI Act and NIST AI RMF assessments. Backend tests in test_controls_library.py and test_ai_compliance.py. Frontend tests in controls-library.spec.ts and ai-compliance.spec.ts.

controls_library.custom_control_creation: PASS - LOD1 creates DRAFT, LOD2/Admin creates APPROVED
controls_library.approval_workflow: PASS - LOD2 can approve/reject LOD1 controls
controls_library.control_filtering: PASS - Filter by framework, AI controls, pending review
controls_library.control_testing_lifecycle: PASS - Create, update, submit, review tests

ai_compliance.ai_system_registration: PASS - Register with risk category, deployment status
ai_compliance.ai_frameworks_endpoint: PASS - Returns EU AI Act and NIST AI RMF
ai_compliance.eu_ai_act_assessment: PASS - Creates assessment with 10+ mandatory controls
ai_compliance.nist_ai_rmf_assessment: PASS - Creates assessment with GOVERN/MAP/MEASURE/MANAGE functions

mocked_apis_verified.gap_analysis: Uses predefined framework requirements - verified working
